title: 100-item ranked bibliography with verification levels A/B/C × core/extended
public_claim: Russian reference handoff is a ranked bibliography and source-authority packet for Russia and Eurasia work.
distinctive_mechanism: It classifies one hundred sources by verification level and core or extended role, including Routledge, Oxford, Cambridge Companion, Cambridge History, and Russia/Eurasia reference anchors.
use_value: It matters because Russia analysis should be built on ranked source authority rather than opportunistic citation.

claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
